title: satureja varia subsp. thymoides
intro: Satureja varia subsp. thymoides, also known as the Greek mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja varia subsp. thymoides include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Satureja varia subsp. thymoides include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
